text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is feeling under the weather, so I
send her to the infirmary to rest.
choice_data_list: Don't push yourself too hard. Just rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not pushing myself... Anyway, later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about this... I'll try to recover as soon as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Where am I? Wait a second...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Where am I? Wait a second...

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
Is it true that you got a modeling contract and
you're moving abroad?!

text_block_list.name: Crush
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... But I can't stand to be away from you!
Won't you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's happening?! Those two are from the
manga I drew!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The protagonist races in the Twinkle Series, but
an upperclassman she admires who's a popular
model invites her to move abroad...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't decide whether she should chase after
her love or her dream, so I just stopped writing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder how things pan out for the two of
them.

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be apart from you either. But I
also can't give up my dream of reaching the top
of the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
I'll run so well in my races that you'll see me on TV
and online every day, no matter where in the
world you are!

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
And I want to see you too, so work hard and
make it big! Then, one day, you'll come back for
me, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Crush
text_block_list.text: So that's your answer.

text_block_list.name: Crush
text_block_list.text:
All right... We'll be together even though we're
apart! Let's both achieve our dreams!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wah?! W-was that a dream?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So that's what happens... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good luck, you two... I'll do my best too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro Dober is able to fully recover
from her exhaustion and returns to her normal
self.

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
So I'll destroy this world for tearing the two of us
apart!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Crush
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... My selfishness in wanting to
keep you close to me has turned you into an evil
queen!

text_block_list.name: Crush
text_block_list.text:
This is my doing... As the hero, I'll take you down
myself!

text_block_list.name: Protagonist
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh... I won't let that happen. You'll be living
with me in the world I'll create for just the two of
us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Agh! Stop! This makes no sense!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wah?! W-was that a dream?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Thank goodness that wasn't real... Worst
plot twist I've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is so shaken that she doesn't get
any meaningful rest, mentally or physically.
